using System.Threading;
using System.Threading.Tasks;

namespace WNZL.ICOW.DeceasedEstates.Services.Contracts
{
    public interface IDiaExceptionNotificationService
    {
        Task NotifyAsync(
            bool sendErrorEmail,
            bool logError,
            string logErrorTitle,
            string logErrorProcessName,
            string errorEmailBody,
            string errorEmailSubject,
            string senderConfigKey,
            string recipientConfigKey,
            string logErrorFormattedError,
            string logType,
            CancellationToken ct = default);
    }
}

Add DIA exception notification service contract using PascalCase naming
